title: Drug Products - Canada.ca
content:
Health Canada participates in international regulatory cooperation work, sharing resources and knowledge with other governments around the world. The Health Products and Food Branch (HPFB) is a significant contributor to international harmonization efforts, especially through the creation and implementation of technical guidance and standards for the development, registration and control of drug products.

## What information can you find here?
This section contains links to information on International initiatives related to drug products.
- International Coalition of Medicines Regulatory Authorities (ICMRA) - Fact Sheet and Frequently Asked Questions
- Cooperative Agreements and Activities
- International Conference on Harmonisation of Technical Requirements for the Registration of Pharmaceuticals for Human Use (ICH)
- International Strategy and Inventory
